hook.summary: A man delivers 'bad news' to his partner, which is revealed to be a game achievement.
hook.visual_action: A man sits on a couch looking at a tablet, reacting with shock and excitement.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I have bad news babe. What's up? I just made the 8 ball in.

scene_flow: UGC skit of a man telling his partner 'bad news' which is a game win.
Gameplay footage of 8-ball pool with the creator's reaction in a corner.
Creator delivers a direct-to-camera call to action to download the game.
3D-rendered animation of pool balls with a large CTA button.
Final brand screen with the game title and a gameplay preview.
on_screen_text: I just made the 8 ball in
everyone thinks they're good at 8 Ball Pool until they try it
tap below to download and play a game now
audience_proxy: Casual male gamers who enjoy competitive social sports games like pool.
